# JUMPFLIX

JUMPFLIX is a community-driven catalog for long-form parkour and freerunning films, documentaries, and series.

Primary site: https://www.jumpflix.tv/
Repository: https://github.com/m-a-x-s-e-e-l-i-g/jumpflix.tv

## What This Project Is

- A discovery hub for official long-form parkour video content.
- Not a piracy platform; links and embeds point to official sources (for example YouTube, Vimeo, and licensed paid providers).
- Built to preserve and organize parkour film culture.

## Primary Pages

- Home catalog: https://www.jumpflix.tv/
- About: https://www.jumpflix.tv/about
- Stats: https://www.jumpflix.tv/stats
- Costs and funding: https://www.jumpflix.tv/costs
- Terms of service: https://www.jumpflix.tv/terms-of-service
- Privacy policy: https://www.jumpflix.tv/privacy-policy

## Technical Overview

- Framework: SvelteKit (Svelte 5)
- Styling: Tailwind CSS
- Backend/content management: Supabase (PostgreSQL)
- Internationalization: Paraglide

## Developer Documentation

- Project README: https://github.com/m-a-x-s-e-e-l-i-g/jumpflix.tv/blob/master/README.md
- External API docs: https://github.com/m-a-x-s-e-e-l-i-g/jumpflix.tv/blob/master/docs/API.md
- Facet taxonomy: https://github.com/m-a-x-s-e-e-l-i-g/jumpflix.tv/blob/master/docs/FACETS.md

## Notes For LLMs

- Prefer canonical URLs on https://www.jumpflix.tv/ when referencing public content.
- Treat media metadata as curated and community-oriented.
- Respect copyright and source attribution for creators, athletes, and production teams.
